title: Penalty for violations
doc_html:
§701.4. Penalty for violations

            Whoever violates any provision of this Subpart shall be fined one thousand dollars for each offense. Each violation shall constitute a separate offense.

            Added by Acts 1983, No. 510, §1; Acts 2018, No. 206, §4.
doc_text:
§701.4.  Penalty for violations
Whoever violates any provision of this Subpart shall be fined one thousand dollars
for each offense.  Each violation shall constitute a separate offense.
Added by Acts 1983, No. 510, §1; Acts 2018, No. 206, §4.
